summary: Cloudinary integration testing complete. All features working correctly - signature endpoint, memo uploads, certificate scan uploads. Fixed a bug in folder validation. Legacy base64 data display works correctly for backward compatibility.
passed_tests: GET /api/cloudinary/signature - Returns valid signature with cloud_name, api_key, timestamp
GET /api/cloudinary/signature - Correctly rejects invalid folder paths
PUT /api/jobs/{id}/memo - Saves Cloudinary URL to job's signed_memo_url field
PUT /api/stones/{id}/certificate-scan - Saves Cloudinary URL to stone's certificate_scan_url field
Backend accepts base64 data for backward compatibility
Jobs page: Upload Memo button visible and functional
Jobs page: View Memo button visible for jobs with memo
Jobs page: Memo viewer dialog opens and displays content
Stones page: Upload Certificate Scan button visible and functional
Stones page: View Certificate Scan button visible for stones with scan
Stones page: Certificate scan viewer dialog displays both base64 and Cloudinary URLs
Stones page: Group indicator shows 'This stone is part of Certificate Group X'
Shipments page: Nested job dialog includes Signed Memo section
Shipments page: Upload Memo and View Memo buttons work in shipment context

fixes_applied.issue: Folder validation was too strict - rejected 'uploads' without trailing slash
fixes_applied.fix: Changed ALLOWED_FOLDERS to ALLOWED_FOLDER_PREFIXES and updated validation to accept both 'uploads' and 'uploads/' formats

seed_data_creation: Test memo URL and certificate scan URL were saved during API testing. These are test URLs that demonstrate the integration works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloudinary integration is fully functional. Backend provides signature endpoint at /api/cloudinary/signature. Frontend uses cloudinaryApi.uploadFile() which gets a signature, uploads directly to Cloudinary, then saves the URL to the backend. Legacy base64 data is still supported for backward compatibility. Test credentials: admin@bashari.com / admin123. Cloud name: grs-service
